name: Per Aarsleff Holding A/S
summary: Per Aarsleff Holding A/S, together with its subsidiaries, offers building construction and civil engineering services in Denmark and internationally. It operates through three segments: Construction, Pipe Technologies, and Ground Engineering. The Construction segment offers domicile construction, building renovation, and technical contracts, as well as infrastructure projects involving district heating, earthwork, roads, sewers, cables, paving, and railway work. The Pipe Technologies segment offers pipe renewal services. The Ground Engineering segment offers pile driving and foundation work, including sheet pile walls and combi walls, secant pile walls, and diaphragm walls, as well as driven and drilled king post walls. The company was formerly known as Per Aarsleff A/S and changed its name to Per Aarsleff Holding A/S in April 2016. Per Aarsleff Holding A/S was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Viby J, Denmark.
